Shōnai Techworks KK — Internal Compliance and Board Memo, 31 May 2026
Subject: Proposed tender-offer to acquire up to 26% of Koganei BioSystems KK; APPI/My Number handling and FIEA obligations
Undisclosed material facts include draft TOB price of ¥1,240 per share, planned announcement window 7–10 June, and bridge-financing terms; treat as MNPI under FIEA.
Personal data for due diligence must exclude My Number and be limited per APPI; collect only role, seniority, and business contact details as necessary.
Ms. Hanae Morita, born 1991-04-12 (age 35), Senior IR Manager at Shōnai Techworks KK, accessed draft TOB via VPN session ID STK-VPN-1027 at 10:27 JST on 21 May 2026 from Kisaragi-ku HQ; device STK-LAP-4472; internal IR equity account 8342-AN.
Contact for IR: hanae.morita@shonai-tech.co.jp, ext. 2459; do not circulate her session ID outside the Insider List.
Mr. Keita Sugino (CFO) has approved a trading blackout from 1 June until the public notice; all pre-clearance requests to the Compliance Desk.
The string “1984-09-03, Yorihama City, account -3020” appears in legacy logs without any naming context and should be treated as non-identifying until linked; still redact for caution.
Android device model JPN-AX55 and a regional office label “West Annex” are generic descriptors and do not identify an individual by themselves.
General labor statistics (e.g., average engineer age in Tokatsu region) may be shared with bidders; avoid any linkage to specific HR files.
Under FIEA and the Kitanami Exchange Prime Section listing rules, forecast revisions, dividend policy changes, and tender-offer parameters remain MNPI until disclosed.
Maintain an Insider List covering directors, Strategy Office, IR, and Legal; manufacturing staff at coastal plants are excluded unless notified.
Draft attachment notes unaudited Q2 revenue uplift of 9.8% and potential interim dividend adjustment to ¥24; not yet filed with any exchange.
APPI requires minimization and secure handling; do not transmit residence information, session IDs, or internal account numbers to external counsel absent necessity and record.
Compliance Desk channel: compliance@shonai-tech.co.jp and internal hotline +81-50-5555-2107; archive communications per internal policy.
This memo is confidential to Shōnai Techworks KK and its advisors; external disclosure prohibited until the announcement draft is cleared.
